Motion On Petitioners'/ Pltfs' Peremptory Writ And Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Sep-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MAGGIE ROBERTS & ATTY. WILLIAM LEINER OF THE DISABILITY RIGHTS CALIFORNIA, TEL. NO. (510) 267-1200 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
ATTY. GREGORY D. BROWN, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-5461 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; Motion On Petitioners / Plaintiffs Peremptory Writ And Declaratory Relief IS DENIED. PETITIONERS HAVE NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT SECTION 11464 D IS PRE-EMPTED. THE LEGISLATURE IS ENTITLED TO MAKE DETERMINATIONS AND ARE PRESUMED TO TAKE INTO ACCOUNT ALL INFORMATIONS BEFORE THE COURT AS WELL AS ANY OTHER INFORMATION THAT THE LEGISLATURE FINDS RELEVANT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 = (301/PJB)
